blended.narrative: Okemo is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,742 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
